message:
fix(scheduler): reduce spin/yield limits and preserve task context through poll cycle

Two scheduler improvements to reduce idle CPU and fix I/O access:

1. Reduce SPIN_LIMIT 64->8 and YIELD_LIMIT 16->2 to prevent runaway
   idle CPU burn on noisy wake paths. Add reactor-emptiness check
   (!io.is_empty()) before polling to skip unnecessary I/O work.

2. Preserve full Cx (runtime context) through the entire task poll
   cycle instead of deferring setup. Uses _cx_guard = Cx::set_current()
   during poll so async I/O drivers can reach the runtime via
   Cx::current(). Fixes tasks that need reactor access mid-poll.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
